purpose: Create a local-first MVP for a new AI Skill or Agent portfolio project.
recommended_steps: Confirm project positioning and MVP boundary
Add demo data and safety boundaries
risk_notes: Keep MVP scoped and avoid premature SaaS architecture.
Use demo data only unless the user explicitly approves real data.

purpose: Prepare a demo-safe GitHub public showcase release surface.
recommended_steps: Confirm .gitignore excludes outputs and private data
Run secret and data safety checks
risk_notes: Do not include .env, credentials, tokens, private screenshots, or generated outputs.
Do not push or modify remotes unless explicitly requested.

purpose: Fix a scoped bug with reproduction, regression test, and minimal edit.
recommended_steps: Read current status and issue description
Add or update a focused regression test
risk_notes: Do not change public behavior beyond the bugfix unless required.

purpose: Synchronize README, PROJECT_STATUS, planning docs, and manifest checkpoints.
recommended_steps: Update only status and metadata fields
Run lightweight compile or parse checks
risk_notes: Keep this pass metadata-only unless user asks for features.
Do not overstate GitHub or profile pin status.

purpose: Generate structured Markdown, text, and JSON delivery artifacts.
recommended_steps: Collect completed items and validation results
Generate JSON export for future tooling
risk_notes: Do not export private paths, secrets, or client data.
Keep generated artifacts out of GitHub unless they are intentional demo samples.

purpose: Convert a portfolio workflow into a bounded client delivery checklist without overbuilding.
recommended_steps: Clarify target user and business pain
Separate demo features from delivery requirements
Identify privacy and data handling risks
Recommend a small paid pilot scope
risk_notes: Do not promise automation over user accounts without explicit consent.
Do not treat a portfolio MVP as production SaaS.
